2020: Baseline year established for coastal monitoring. Initial seagrass coverage: 0.1 km². Seaweed areas: 0.6 km².
2021: During 2021, seagrass coverage increased by 0.2 km² compared to 2020. Seaweed increased by 0.7 km². Sand shoals expanded by 1.5 km². Overall, the coastal ecosystem shows positive trends in biodiversity indicators.
2022: During 2022, seagrass coverage remained stable by 0.0 km² compared to 2021. Seaweed increased by 0.2 km². Sand shoals contracted by 1.9 km². Overall, the coastal ecosystem shows mixed trends in biodiversity indicators.
2023: During 2023, seagrass coverage decreased by 0.2 km² compared to 2022. Seaweed decreased by 1.2 km². Sand shoals expanded by 0.4 km². Overall, the coastal ecosystem shows mixed trends in biodiversity indicators.
2024: During 2024, seagrass coverage increased by 0.1 km² compared to 2023. Seaweed increased by 0.4 km². Sand shoals contracted by 0.2 km². Overall, the coastal ecosystem shows positive trends in biodiversity indicators.
2025: During 2025, seagrass coverage remained stable by 0.0 km² compared to 2024. Seaweed decreased by 0.5 km². Sand shoals contracted by 1.0 km². Overall, the coastal ecosystem shows mixed trends in biodiversity indicators.
